name: The Water Hazard Bar + Lounge at Chelsea Piers
address: 59 Chelsea Piers First Floor, New York, NY 10011
about: The Water Hazard Bar + Lounge is a golf simulator venue located within Chelsea Piers, New York. It offers a unique experience combining golf simulation with a full-service bar and lounge atmosphere. The venue is part of a larger sports complex, suggesting it may have access to various athletic facilities. It is designed for those looking to enjoy golf in a social setting with food and beverages available on-site.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines golf simulation with a premium social lounge experience
Located within the Chelsea Piers sports complex, offering a unique entertainment destination
Provides a relaxed environment to play golf while enjoying food and drinks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best simulation experience. Please contact the venue directly for details on club rentals if you do not have your own.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not allowed, as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar service to guests during their visit.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes will vary based on simulator usage and wait times. It is best to check with the venue directly for specific session durations.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue has not specified its policy on children. It is recommended to contact them directly to inquire about age restrictions or family-friendly hours.
